privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating multi-wavelength astronomical observations of three supernova remnants (Tycho, Crab, Cas A). It operates in a KStars simulated environment using a mixture of synthetic FITS exposures (from KStars CCD simulator using filters Ha at slot 5 and OIII at slot 6 for 60 seconds) and real DSS2 Color sky survey data fetched via CDS hips2fits (used by capture_sky_view.sh for 0.5-degree FOV surveys). The verifier enforces a unique MD5 hash check on the downloaded survey images to ensure the agent physically slews the telescope between targets, preventing trivial cheating.
